name: MT QED-cavity coherence (Mavromatos 2025)
protection_mechanism: high-Q QED cavity + ordered-water dipole shielding (no numerically-justified protection factor supplied)
claim_source: Mavromatos, Mershin & Nanopoulos, arXiv:2505.20364 (2025), 'On the Potential of Microtubules for Scalable Quantum Computation', Table 2 decoherence time O(10^-6) s
notes: Theoretically predicted microsecond MT coherence via cavity isolation. No HEOM/Redfield dephasing calculation; protection not expressed as a factor our model supports.

name: Cryptophyte PE545 few-hundred-fs coherence (2024)
claim_source: pmid:40401677 (2024, 'Quantum phase synchronization revealing few-hundred femtosecond coherence in cryptophyte phycoerythrin 545'); corroborated by Mavromatos 2025 Table 3 'Photosynthetic coherence time 300 fs'
notes: Experimentally observed room-temperature antenna coherence; exciton-vibrational coupling is the documented mechanism.

name: Cry4a quantum-Zeno radical-pair compass (2025)
protection_mechanism: quantum Zeno effect + CISS chirality-enhanced hyperfine protection
claim_source: arXiv:2505.01519 (2025, 'Chirality-bolstered quantum Zeno effect enhances radical pair-based magnetoreception'); Hore quantum-needle requirement >few us (PNAS 113, 4634, 2016)
notes: Spin regime; radical-pair lifetime must exceed a few microseconds for the avian compass. Distinct baseline from electronic coherence.
